7 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
8 #include "arcane/BasicService.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
10 
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IFunctionR4vR1.h"
12 #include "ShakeMeshService.h"
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupBuilder.h"
17 #include <stdlib.h>
18 
19 using namespace Arcane;
20 
21 double
22 ShakeMeshService::
23 _myrandom()
24 {
25 #ifdef ARCANE_OS_WIN32
26  return (double)( rand() / (RAND_MAX + 1) );
27 #else
28  return drand48();
29 #endif
30 }
31 
32 void ShakeMeshService::ApplyOperator() {
33 
34  IFunctionR4vR1* Xu = options()->shake_function_x() ;
35  IFunctionR4vR1* Yu = options()->shake_function_y() ;
36  IFunctionR4vR1* Zu = options()->shake_function_z() ;
37  Xu->init() ;
38  Yu->init() ;
39  Zu->init() ;
40  // size of the noise for "the random"
41  Real size_noise = options()->size_noise();
42 
43 
44  VariableNodeReal3 & coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(mesh())->nodesCoordinates();
45  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,ownNodes()) {
46 
47  const Real rx = _myrandom() * size_noise ;
48  const Real ry = _myrandom() * size_noise ;
49  const Real rz = _myrandom() * size_noise ;
50  Real3 coord_node = coords[inode];
51  coord_node += Real3(rx,ry,rz);
52 
53  // New coordinates
54  Real x = Xu->eval(coord_node.x,coord_node.y,coord_node.z,0);
55  Real y = Yu->eval(coord_node.x,coord_node.y,coord_node.z,0);
56  Real z = Zu->eval(coord_node.x,coord_node.y,coord_node.z,0);
57  coords[inode] = Real3(x,y,z);
58 
59  }
60 
61  coords.synchronize();
62 }
63 
64 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_SHAKEMESH(ShakeMesh,ShakeMeshService);
65

IFunctionR4vR1::eval

Point-wise evaluation.

virtual void init()=0
